offer: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, inconsistent financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automatically generate quarterly financial reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent financial reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on financial reporting tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
